CV.TITLE: Senior Software Engineer & Scrum Team Manager
CV.SUMMARY: Software engineer with 15+ years of experience building enterprise Java/Spring applications and leading Agile teams. Currently at My Compliance Office (Dublin), managing a 10+ person team.

EXPERIENCE.role: Senior Software Engineer & Scrum Team Manager
EXPERIENCE.description: MCO provides Conduct Risk software on a single platform integrating Personal Trade Compliance, Third Party Risk Management, and Trade Surveillance.
highlights: Lead and manage a team of 10+ engineers: inspire, mentor and create a productive environment where the team owns the product
Coordinate sprints, retrospective meetings, and daily stand-ups as Scrum Master
Coach team members in Agile methodology and best practices adoption
Design UML diagrams for new functionality and provide architectural solutions
Estimate development time for all tasks; work with PO to handle backlogs and new requests
Development: Java 8, Oracle, Spring, Bootstrap 3, Maven 3, Angular 12
Build and maintain REST web services securing and routing requests between services
Testing with JUnit, Mockito, and Selenium
Mentoring new developers; writing documentation and coding guidelines

EXPERIENCE.description: Stats tool for European football with 500,000+ events (goals, minutes, cards). Fully customisable stats per game.
highlights: Full responsive design and complete deployment of the web application
Stack: Spring 4 MVC, Spring Security, jQuery, JSTL, Hibernate, MySQL, Maven, i18n, GoogleChart, Bootstrap, Jsoup, AJAX
PSA Peugeot (Mar 2013 – Dec 2014): Web apps on Tomcat with J2EE, Oracle, Spring 3, Bootstrap 3, Maven, jQuery, AJAX; SOAP & REST services; bug-fixes and documentation
Prisacom I+D+I / PRISA (Jun 2012 – Mar 2013): Payment gateway (PayPal, Worldpay, BBVA TPV); shopping basket, checkout, order history; Tomcat & JBoss deployment
Telefónica I+D+I (Nov 2011 – Jun 2012): Concert ticket booking & live streaming platform; J2EE, EJB, Struts 2, Hibernate, RESTful; Scrum methodology

EXPERIENCE.description: Main project: roaming calling charge system developed in Java, C and shell scripts.
highlights: Backend development with Java and Oracle
Web applications on GlassFish: J2EE, MySQL, Oracle, Unix, Hibernate, EJB 3.0, AJAX
Writing documentation and tutorials for developers and interns
